name: Impossible Tuna Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a pie plate, measuring approximately 10 x 1-1/2 inches.
3. Layer the tuna, celery, cheese, and green onions in the pie plate.
4. In a blender, beat the remaining ingredients for about 15 seconds.
5. Pour the mixture over the layered ingredients in the pie plate.
6. Bake until golden brown or a knife inserted into the center comes out clean (approximately 40 minutes).
7. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before serving with lemon wedges if desired.
